text:
31. The certified copy of the order of the Central Government, approving the alteration of the memorandum for transfer
of registered office of the company from one State to another, shall be filed in Form No.INC.28 along with the
fee as with the Registrar of the State within thirty days from the date of receipt of certified copy of the order.
